## oak addon flops tracking

Deploy the Tracking Server and get its URL

### Synopsis

Deploy the Tracking Server Service if it is not yet deployed.

Returns the URL of the tracking server for the specified customer (default: Admin).

```
oak addon flops tracking [customer-id] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for tracking
```
